extDescription.message: Compares, 100% locally, who you follow on Instagram with who follows you back.

appTagline.message: Find out who you follow that doesn't follow you back.

emptyNonFollowers.message: 🎉 Everyone you follow follows you back.

emptyFans.message: You already follow back all of your followers.

privacyNote.message: 100% local. No password, no server — your data never leaves your browser.

errOpenProfile.message: Open your profile's main page and try again.

errOwnProfile.message: Open your own Instagram profile to analyze.

errNoSession.message: Couldn't read your session. Make sure you're logged in to Instagram.

errRateLimited.message: Instagram is rate-limiting requests. Wait a few minutes and try again.

errBlocked.message: Instagram blocked or changed the response. Please try again later.

errNetwork.message: Network failure. Check your connection and try again.

errAlreadyRunning.message: An analysis is already running. Please wait.

errNotInstagram.message: Open Instagram in a tab and try again.

errGeneric.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
